name: Async
description: IDE, A native-feeling AI coding workspace that blends chat, planning, agent execution, and project navigation into a unified desktop experience.
summaryZh: IDE, A native-feeling AI coding workspace that blends chat, planning, agent execution, and project navigation into a unified desktop experience. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
